title: Blue-fronted Amazon roosts in Brazil Seixas and Mourao 2018
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8koae","text":"The data-base are monthly counts in five communal roosts of Blue-fronted Amazon (Amazona aestiva) in the Brazilian Pantanal, carried out from July, 2004 to June, 2009.
